name: TA Columbia (TravelCenters of America #6)
description: Full-service TA travel center at I-80 Exit 4 (Route 94) in the Knowlton/Columbia area, the only major truck stop on I-80 in New Jersey, with truck parking, fuel lanes, showers, TA Truck Service repair bays, a CAT scale, and Country Pride/Taco Bell/Pizza Hut dining.

name: CAT Scale at TA Columbia
description: Certified CAT Scale located at the TA travel center at I-80 Exit 4 (Route 94) in Columbia, the only CAT Scale on I-80 in New Jersey.

name: I-80 Weigh & Inspection Station (Eastbound, Knowlton)
description: Eastbound commercial-vehicle truck weigh and inspection station near milepost 2 in Knowlton Township, just east of the Delaware Water Gap/Pennsylvania line.

name: Knowlton Visitor Information Center / Rest Area (Eastbound)
description: Eastbound I-80 welcome center and rest area near milepost 7 with a separate truck parking area, restrooms, vending, and picnic facilities.

name: I-80 Wayside Rest Area (Eastbound, Allamuchy area)
description: Eastbound I-80 wayside near milepost 21 offering truck and passenger vehicle parking plus a picnic area, with no restrooms.

name: I-80 Wayside Rest Area (Westbound, Allamuchy area)
description: Westbound I-80 wayside near milepost 21 offering truck and passenger vehicle parking plus a picnic area, with no restrooms.

name: I-80 Rest Area (Eastbound, milepost 32)
description: Eastbound I-80 wayside rest area near milepost 32 with truck and passenger vehicle parking and a picnic spot, no restrooms.

name: I-80 Rest Area (Westbound, milepost 32, truck-only)
description: Westbound I-80 truck-only rest area near milepost 32 (no passenger vehicles, RVs, or buses permitted).
